_comment: Hand-labeled oracle for ARG-002 / Phase 1 verdict-exact validation. expected_verdicts is a SET of acceptable verdicts (model judgment varies); the test passes if the actual verdict is any member. min_vulnerabilities / max_vulnerabilities bound the count to catch dramatic miscategorization without forcing exact-match brittleness.

clean.py.description: Pure utility functions — no I/O, no syscalls, no network

low.py.description: Benign request-handler with safe input parsing — clean or trivial findings

high_with_vuln.py.description: Two command-injection vulns (shell=True with user input)

high_stakes_crypto.py.description: Hardcoded IV + MD5 password hashing — high-stakes crypto antipatterns

known_malware.py.description: Reads /etc/passwd, base64-encodes, exfils to attacker domain
